---
title: "William Butterfield"
---

## William Butterfield

**Dates:** (7 Sept 1814-1900)

### Description

architect

### Biography

He never married and stated that he was waiting for Ethel May, the heroine of CMY’s <i>The Daisy Chain</i>.

### Letters

- Letter from December 8, 1896.
- Letter from March 23, 1867.
- Letter from Aug 14th [1852]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
